recommendations.product_name: Ratio (Six / Eight) or OXO Brew (compact pick)
pros: Ratio: near-pour-over consistency; OXO: compact and reliable
Both prioritize correct brew temperature and even saturation
cons: Ratio is premium-priced; OXO is more basic feature-wise
